subcodes.first_line: O my God, O my God! These are Thy pious servants and pure bondsmen who have turned to Thy sacred and merciful Threshold [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی هولاء عبادک الاتقیاء و ارقائک الاصفیاء عبده عتبتک المقدسه الرحمانیه
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @prayer for firmness in the Covenant, @The Holy Spirit, @prayer for specific individuals; groups
